2. Click on '...'

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

- Node.js version: [e.g., 22.0.0]
- Project version: [e.g., 0.3.0]
- Installation method: [e.g., Desktop app, from source]
